scripts.test:option-fixtures: cargo test -p alpaca-option --test fixtures -- --include-ignored && pnpm --filter @alpaca/option test:fixtures
scripts.test:packages:full: pnpm run test:packages && pnpm run test:option-fixtures
scripts.typecheck:packages: pnpm --filter @alpaca/time typecheck && pnpm --filter @alpaca/option typecheck && pnpm --filter @alpaca/trade typecheck && pnpm --dir website typecheck
